properties.mapping SurgicalProcedure_Code:
SELECT 	"Dataset_Identifier" AS datasetId,
		'Treatment' AS propertyNameOriginal,
		"Treatment" AS originalValue,
		'SurgicalProcedure_Code' AS propertyNameEUCAIM,
        "SurgicalProcedure_Code" AS codeInEUCAIM,
		CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS VARCHAR) AS mappingTimestamp
FROM FLOWFILE
properties.Dataset:
SELECT 	"Dataset_Identifier" AS Identifier,
		"Dataset_Identifier" AS Title,
		'0' as Processed
FROM FLOWFILE
properties.mapping Procedure1_ProcedureCode:
SELECT 	"Dataset_Identifier" AS datasetId,
		'Imaging procedure (CT MRI)' AS propertyNameOriginal,
		"Imaging procedure (CT MRI)" AS originalValue,
		'Procedure1_ProcedureCode' AS propertyNameEUCAIM,
        "Procedure1_ProcedureCode" AS codeInEUCAIM,
		CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS VARCHAR) AS mappingTimestamp
FROM FLOWFILE
properties.mapping Patient_BirthSex:
SELECT 	"Dataset_Identifier" AS datasetId,
		'Gender' AS propertyNameOriginal,
		"Gender" AS originalValue,
		'Patient_BirthSex' AS propertyNameEUCAIM,
        "Patient_BirthSex" AS codeInEUCAIM,
		CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS VARCHAR) AS mappingTimestamp
FROM FLOWFILE
properties.Patient:
SELECT 	"Dataset_Identifier" AS DatasetIdentifier,
		"Patient_Identifier" AS Identifier,
		"Population" AS	DiagnosticCategoryOriginal,
		"Gender" AS BirthSexOriginal,
        "Patient_BirthSex" AS BirthSexEucaim,
		'0' as Processed
FROM FLOWFILE
properties.mapping Tumor_Size_DimensionUnit:
SELECT 	"Dataset_Identifier" AS datasetId,
		'Dimension unit' AS propertyNameOriginal,
		"Dimension unit" AS originalValue,
		'Tumor_Size_DimensionUnit' AS propertyNameEUCAIM,
        "Tumor_Size_DimensionUnit" AS codeInEUCAIM,
		CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS VARCHAR) AS mappingTimestamp
FROM FLOWFILE
properties.Radiotherapy:
SELECT 	"Dataset_Identifier" AS DatasetIdentifier,
		"Patient_Identifier" AS PatientIdentifier,
		"Radiotherapy_ProcedureIdentifier" AS TreatmentIdentifier,
		"Radiotherapy_StartDate" AS PerformedDate, 
		"Radiotherapy_Modality" AS Modality,
		"Radiotherapy_Technique" AS Technique,
		"Radiotherapy_TotalDoseDelivered" AS TotalDoseDelivered,
		"Radiotherapy_DoseUnit" AS DoseUnit,
		"Radiotherapy_FractionsDelivered" AS FractionDelivered
FROM FLOWFILE
properties.mapping Radiotherapy_DoseUnit:
SELECT 	"Dataset_Identifier" AS datasetId,
		'Units: Gy' AS propertyNameOriginal,
		"Units: Gy" AS originalValue,
		'Radiotherapy_DoseUnit' AS propertyNameEUCAIM,
        "Radiotherapy_DoseUnit" AS codeInEUCAIM,
		CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS VARCHAR) AS mappingTimestamp
FROM FLOWFILE
properties.mapping PrimaryCancerCondition_Code:
SELECT 	"Dataset_Identifier" AS datasetId,
		'Pathology' AS propertyNameOriginal,
		"Pathology" AS originalValue,
		'PrimaryCancerCondition_Code' AS propertyNameEUCAIM,
        "PrimaryCancerCondition_Code" AS codeInEUCAIM,
		CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS VARCHAR) AS mappingTimestamp
FROM FLOWFILE
properties.Episode:
SELECT 	"Patient_Identifier" || 'episode_1' AS Identifier,
		"Dataset_Identifier" AS DatasetIdentifier,
		"Patient_Identifier" AS PatientIdentifier,
		"Episode_Type" AS	TypeOriginal,
		"Episode_StartDate" AS StartDate
FROM FLOWFILE
properties.mapping Radiotherapy_Modality:
SELECT 	"Dataset_Identifier" AS datasetId,
		'Radiotherapy modality' AS propertyNameOriginal,
		"Radiotherapy modality" AS originalValue,
		'Radiotherapy_Modality' AS propertyNameEUCAIM,
        "Radiotherapy_Modality" AS codeInEUCAIM,
		CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS VARCHAR) AS mappingTimestamp
FROM FLOWFILE
properties.mapping Radiotherapy_Technique:
SELECT 	"Dataset_Identifier" AS datasetId,
		'Radiotherapy technique' AS propertyNameOriginal,
		"Radiotherapy technique" AS originalValue,
		'Radiotherapy_Technique' AS propertyNameEUCAIM,
        "Radiotherapy_Technique" AS codeInEUCAIM,
		CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS VARCHAR) AS mappingTimestamp
FROM FLOWFILE
properties.Surgery:
SELECT 	"Dataset_Identifier" AS DatasetIdentifier,
		"Patient_Identifier" AS PatientIdentifier,
		"SurgicalProcedure_ProcedureIdentifier" AS	TreatmentIdentifier,
        "SurgicalProcedure_PerformedDate" AS PerformedDate,
        "SurgicalProcedure_Code" AS ProcedureEUCAIM
FROM FLOWFILE
properties.Primary Cancer Condition:
SELECT 	"Dataset_Identifier" AS DatasetIdentifier,
		"Patient_Identifier" AS PatientIdentifier,
		"PrimaryCancerCondition_Identifier" AS Identifier,
		CAST(REPLACE("PrimaryCancerCondition_AgeAtDiagnosis", ',', '.') AS DOUBLE) AS AgeOfDiagnosis,
		'Year' AS AgeUnitOriginal,
		"PrimaryCancerCondition_AgeUnitConcept" AS AgeUnitEUCAIM,
		"Topography : Organ" AS BodySiteOriginal,
		"PrimaryCancerCondition_BodySiteCode" AS BodySiteEUCAIM,
		"ImagingProcedure_ProcedureIdentifier" AS ConfirmedByProcedure,
		"Histological subtype according to WHO 2020" AS HistologyMorphologyBehaviourOriginal,
		"PrimaryCancerCondition_HistologyMorphologyBehaviourCode" AS HistologyMorphologyBehaviourEUCAIM
FROM FLOWFILE
properties.mapping Tumor_BodySite:
SELECT 	"Dataset_Identifier" AS datasetId,
		'Topography : Organ' AS propertyNameOriginal,
		"Topography : Organ" AS originalValue,
		'PrimaryCancerCondition_BodySiteCode' AS propertyNameEUCAIM,
        "PrimaryCancerCondition_BodySiteCode" AS codeInEUCAIM,
		CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS VARCHAR) AS mappingTimestamp
FROM FLOWFILE
properties.ImagingProcedure1:
SELECT 	"Dataset_Identifier" AS DatasetIdentifier,
		"Patient_Identifier" AS PatientIdentifier,
		"PrimaryCancerCondition_Identifier" AS PrimaryCancerConditionIdentifier,
		"ImagingProcedure_ProcedureIdentifier" AS ProcedureIdentifier,
        "ImagingProcedure_PerformedDate" AS PerformedDate,
		"Imaging procedure (CT MRI)" AS ImagingProcedureOriginal,
		"ImagingProcedure_ProcedureCode" AS ImagingProcedureEUCAIM
FROM FLOWFILE

properties.log_message: Error writing mapped values to ingestion DB

labels.label:
Loop 03 for clinical data (UoA sarcoma dataset):
* Clinical data input normalized and curated is loaded and converted to a relational model.
* Specific mappings are specified during the Data Holder's analysis phase.
Steps:
1. Read normalized and curated csv file and apply structural mapping preparation
2. Apply lookups for coded values
3. Write values transformed to EUCAIM CDM and hyperontology to ingestion database
